Players.description: The players who are current on this team's active roster/squad

TeamId.description: The unique ID of the team

AreaId.description: The unique ID of the team's current home arena

VenueId.description: The unique ID of the team's venue

Key.description: Abbreviation of the team (e.g. LIV; ARS; MNU; etc.)

Name.description: The mascot of the team (e.g. The Reds, The Gunners, etc.)

FullName.description: The full name of the team (e.g. Liverpool Football Club, Arsenal Football Club, etc.)

Active.description: Whether or not this team is active (true/false)

AreaName.description: The area name of the home team

VenueName.description: The name of the home team's venue

Gender.description: The gender of the players on the team. Possible Values: Male; Female

Type.description: The type of this team. Possible values: Club, National

Address.description: The address of the home team

City.description: The city of the home team

Zip.description: The zip code of the team's home location

Phone.description: The phone number of the home team

Fax.description: The fax number of the home team

Website.description: The website address of the home team

Email.description: The email of the home team

Founded.description: The calendar year that the team was founded

ClubColor1.description: The primary color of this team's logo/uniform/branding

ClubColor2.description: The secondary color of this team's logo/uniform/branding

ClubColor3.description: The tertiary color of this team's logo/uniform/branding

WikipediaLogoUrl.description: The link to the team's logo hosted on Wikipedia (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

WikipediaWordMarkUrl.description: The link to the team's wordmark logo hosted on Wikipedia (This is not licensed for public or commercial use)

GlobalTeamId.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues.
